source: A Class 350 unit has failed at Polesworth station. Take over a rescue train at Rugby to couple to the failed train at Polesworth and bring it back to Rugby.
target: 一列350型电力动车组在波尔斯沃思站发生故障。在拉格比接管一列救援列车，前往波尔斯沃思与故障列车挂靠，并将其带回拉格比。
波折之夜
波折之夜

source: A member of staff is suspicious of a wheelflat on one of the wheels on the rear unit. Stop your train immediately!
target: 一名工作人员怀疑后方车组的一个车轮存在踏面损伤。请立即停车！

source: A new junction will be built here so trains from HS2 will be able to travel over the existing WCML to destinations in Northwest England and Scotland. Other trains on HS2 will travel to a new station at Birmingham Curzon Street, calling at another new station at Birmingham Interchange.
target: 这里将建设一个新立交，以便来自2号高速铁路（HS2）的列车能够通过现有的西海岸干线前往英格兰西北部和苏格兰。HS2上的其他列车将前往伯明翰库松街的新车站，并停靠在伯明翰互通立交的另一个新车站。

source: A passenger is requesting the use of a wheelchair ramp to board the train. Pick one up and place it down at the location indicated.
target: 有一名乘客要求使用轮椅渡板上车。请拿取一块轮椅渡板并放置在指定位置。

source: A storm is passing through the Trent Valley line, causing services to be suspended. Take your Class 350 unit from Stafford southbound, inspecting the line as you go.
target: 一场风暴正穿过特伦特谷线，导致服务暂停。驾驶你的350型电力动车组从斯塔福德出发向南行驶，沿途检查线路。

source: A storm is passing through the Trent Valley line, spreading debris over the tracks. This morning, you’ll be travelling along the line to make sure the line is clear.
target: 一场风暴正穿过特伦特谷线，将瓦砾吹到了轨道上。今天早上，你将沿着线路行驶，以确保线路畅通。

source: A train has failed at Polesworth station, causing confusion and delay. You’ve been called in to rescue the ill-stricken train using the spare unit here in platform three. Once the train has been rescued, you’ll be bringing the train to Northampton Depot, reversing at Tamworth.
target: 一列列车在波尔斯沃思站发生故障，导致了混乱和延误。你被召来使用三站台的备用车组救援这列受阻的列车。一旦救援完成，你将把列车开往北安普顿车辆段，在塔姆沃思进行换向。
自动制动
自动制动
AWC 807型电力动车组 [空车]
AWC 807型电力动车组 [载客]
AWS
加速至每小时20英里（每小时32公里）。
无障碍渡板

source: After your train arrives, follow the same dispatch procedure for the first train.
target: 在你的列车到达后，按照相同的发车程序发运第一班列车。

source: All aboard for the West Coast Main Line: Trent Valley route!
target: 欢迎来到西海岸干线：特伦特谷路线！

source: All aboard for the West Coast Main Line: Trent Valley route!
target: 欢迎来到西海岸干线：特伦特谷路线！

source: Also opened in 1847 with the Trent Valley line, Atherstone station serves the town of Atherstone. The station building on platform two is the only surviving Tudor-style building remaining on the line, being grade II listed since 1980. LNwR provides a local hourly service between London and Crewe.
target: 阿瑟斯通站于1847年与特伦特谷线一同开通，服务于阿瑟斯通镇。二站台上的站房是该线路上唯一幸存的都铎风格建筑，自1980年起被列为二级登录建筑。伦敦及西北铁路（LNwR）在伦敦和克鲁之间提供每小时一班的地方服务。
安德鲁
安

source: Another driver will be along shortly to take the train’s next southbound service. For you, it’s time for a coffee!
target: 另一名司机很快就会过来接管该列车的下一班南行服务。对你来说，是时候喝杯咖啡了！
使用主手柄施加动力。
使用主手柄施加动力。
使用主手柄施加动力。
使用主手柄施加动力。

source: As the day draws to a close, return to the cab as an Avanti West Coast driver for the evening shift on the West Coast Main Line. Handle busy intercity services as passengers make their way home, managing tight timetables, heavy traffic, and fading light between Crewe and Milton Keynes.
target: 随着一天接近尾声，回到驾驶室，作为阿万蒂西海岸（Avanti West Coast）的司机开始西海岸干线的晚班工作。在克鲁和米尔顿凯恩斯之间应对繁忙的城际服务，在乘客回家的途中管理紧张的时间表、繁忙的交通和渐渐消逝的光线。

source: At Hillmorton Junction in the south, the Northampton Loop branches off carrying commuter trains through Northampton and container trains to Daventry. The original WCML diverges at Rugby Trent Valley Junction that travels through Coventry, Birmingham and Wolverhampton. The Trent Valley line provides a more direct route to Stafford.
target: 在南部的希尔莫顿立交，北安普顿环线分叉开来，运送通勤列车通过北安普顿，集装箱列车前往达文特里。原始的西海岸干线在拉格比特伦特谷立交分叉，途径考文垂、伯明翰和伍尔弗汉普顿。而特伦特谷线则提供了前往斯塔福德更直接的路线。
阿瑟斯通 1 站台
阿瑟斯通 1 站台
阿瑟斯通 2 站台

source: Avanti West Coast’s new Class 807 units are undergoing testing on the West Coast Main Line (WCML). Today, you’ll be driving a training service from here at Rugby to Stafford, learning about places of interest en-route.
target: 阿万蒂西海岸的新 807 型电力动车组正在西海岸干线上进行测试。今天，你将驾驶一班从拉格比到斯塔福德的培训列车，了解沿途的景点。

source: Avanti’s new Class 807 units are currently undergoing testing before entering service. Drive a training run from Rugby to Stafford, learning about the line en-route.
target: 阿万蒂西海岸的新 807 型电力动车组目前正在投入运营前进行测试。驾驶一趟从拉格比到斯塔福德的培训列车，了解沿途的线路。
制动
制动
制动

制动
返回

source: Before giving the RA to the driver, make sure the OFF Indicator is showing ‘OFF’. This means the signal at the end of the platform isn’t displaying a danger (red) aspect.
target: 在向司机发出RA（准备就绪）信号之前，确保发车指示器显示为“OFF”。这意味着站台末端的信号机没有显示险阻（红色）信号。

source: Being the smallest station on the Trent Valley, Polesworth station opened in 1847 to serve the village of Polesworth. This station is unique in that only the northbound platform is in use as a result of improvement works to the WCML that resulted in the footbridge being removed. The station is served by one parliamentary train per day.
target: 波尔斯沃思站是特伦特谷线上最小的车站，于1847年开通，服务于波尔斯沃思村。该车站的独特之处在于，由于西海岸干线的改建工程导致天桥被拆除，目前仅有北行站台在使用。该车站每天仅有一班议会列车停靠。

source: Between 2004 and 2008, the Trent Valley line was upgraded again, this time to bring the section between Nuneaton and Colwich Junction to quadruple tracks to allow the Class 390 ‘Pendolino’ trains to operate at their maximum potential. During this time, the line was also resignalled and Rugby station was completely remodelled.
target: 在2004年至2008年之间，特伦特谷线再次进行了升级，这一次是将纽尼顿和科尔威奇立交之间的路段扩建为四线铁路，以允许390型“潘多利诺”列车发挥其最大潜力。在此期间，该线路还重新安装了信号系统，拉格比站也进行了彻底改造。

source: Between 2004 and 2008, the Trent Valley line was upgraded again, this time to bring the section between Nuneaton and Colwich Junction to quadruple tracks to allow the Class 390 ‘Pendolino’ trains to operate at their maximum potential. target: 在2004年至2008年之间，特伦特谷线再次进行了升级，这一次是将纽尼顿和科尔威奇立交之间的路段扩建为四线铁路，以允许390型“潘多利诺”列车发挥其最大潜力。在此期间，该线路还重新安装了信号系统，拉格比站也进行了彻底改造。

source: Brinklow used to have a station; it opened a couple of months after the Trent Valley Line on 1 December 1847 with a small goods yard. The station closed in 1957 with the goods yard following in 1961. The signal box here closed too in 1964 when control was transferred to Rugby.
target: 布林克洛曾经有一个车站；它于1847年12月1日，即特伦特谷线开通几个月后启用，并带有一个小型货场。该车站于1957年关闭，随后货场于1961年关闭。这里的信号楼也在1964年关闭，控制权移交给了拉格比。

source: Colwich Junction is where the Trent Valley line splits where services to Crewe, Liverpool, North Wales and Scotland turn left towards Stafford and services to Stoke-on-Trent and Manchester turn right towards Stone. We turn left, following the A513 road through Shrugborough Tunnel to Stafford.

source: Driver: “A member of train staff has identified a wheelflat on my train. I am going to stop at Polesworth station to undertake a visual inspection.”
target: 司机：“一名列车乘务人员发现我的列车有车辆踏面损伤。我将在波尔斯沃思站停车进行外观检查。”

source: Driver: “Debris has built-up across the Down Slow and Down Fast lines and I am unable to go further.”
target: 司机：“下行慢车线和下行快车线上堆积了瓦砾，我无法继续前行。”

source: Driver: “Hello Colwich Signaller. This is the driver of 1Z97 standing at signal NL9450 on the Down Fast Trent Valley.”
target: 司机：“你好，科尔威奇信号员。我是1Z97次列车的司机，目前停在下行快车特伦特谷线的NL9450号信号机前。”

source: Driver: “Hello Colwich signaller. This is the driver of 1U41 standing at the Polesworth station platform. I have visually inspected my train and can confirm my train is fit to move.”
target: 司机：“你好，科尔威奇信号员。我是1U41次列车的司机，目前停在波尔斯沃思站站台。我已经对我的列车进行了外观检查，可以确认列车具备运行条件。”

source: Driver: “Hello Colwich signaller. This is the driver of 1U41 standing on the Trent Valley Down Slow.”
target: 司机：“你好，科尔威奇信号员。我是1U41次列车的司机，目前停在特伦特谷下行慢车线上。”

source: Driver: “Hello Colwich signaller. This is the driver of 1Z99 at Polesworth station. I have coupled to the failed train and I’m waiting for further instructions.”
target: 司机：“你好，科尔威奇信号员。我是1Z99次列车的司机，目前在波尔斯沃思站。我已与故障列车重联，正在等待进一步指示。”

source: Driver: “Hello Colwich signaller. This is the driver of 1Z99 standing at signal NL5473 on the Down Trent Valley Slow, requesting permission to enter the occupied section to couple to the failed train in Polesworth station.”
target: 司机：“你好，科尔威奇信号员。我是1Z99次列车的司机，目前停在下行特伦特谷慢车线的NL5473号信号机前，申请进入已占用区间，以与波尔斯沃思站内的故障列车重联。”

source: Driver: “I am to continue to Tamworth and detach the damaged unit there.”
target: 司机：“我将继续前往塔姆沃思，并在那里解编受损的编组。”

source: Driver: “I am to depart when ready with service 5Z35 to Northampton Depot, reversing at Tamworth station.”
target: 司机：“我将在准备就绪后驾驶5Z35次列车前往北安普顿车段，在塔姆沃思站换向。”

source: Driver: “I am to shut down my train and remain at my current position.”
target: 司机：“我要将我的列车停机并保持在当前位置。”

source: Driver: “I understand that I have permission to pass signal NL5473 at danger and to proceed at caution to couple to the failed train in Polesworth station.”
target: 司机：“我明白我已获得允许，可以越过显示红灯的NL5473号信号机，并谨慎运行以与波尔斯沃思站内的故障列车重联。”
司机：“是的，没错。”
司机：“是的，没错。”
司机：“是的，没错。”

source: Initially opening as a double-track line, demand on the line meant it was upgraded to quadruple-track running in the early 20th century. As part of British Rail’s modernisation plan of 1955, the Trent Valley line was electrified with overhead wires in the 1960s allowing electric locomotives to operate at 100 mph.
target: 该线路最初作为双线铁路开通，由于运能需求巨大，在20世纪初升级为复复线运行。作为英国铁路1955年现代化计划的一部分，特伦特谷线在20世纪60年代完成了高架接触网电气化改造，允许电力机车以100英里/小时的速度运行。

source: Opened in 1837 by the Grand Junction Railway, Stafford station serves the town of Stafford. The station is served by a wide range of services from all over the UK by Avanti West Coast, CrossCountry and LNwR. It is popular with rail enthusiasts due to the high level of freight services that pass through the station daily.
target: 斯塔福德站于1837年由大联结铁路公司开通，服务于斯塔福德镇。该站由 Avanti West Coast、CrossCountry 和 LNwR 运营，提供往返英国各地的广泛列车服务。由于每天有大量的货运列车通过该站，这里非常受铁路爱好者的欢迎。

source: Opened in 1839 by the Birmingham and Derby Junction Railway, Tamworth is one of two stations on the Trent Valley line to have high-level and low-level platforms. The high-level platforms are served by CrossCountry services between Birmingham and Derby.
target: 塔姆沃思站于1839年由伯明翰和德比联结铁路公司开通，是特伦特谷线上拥有高架站台和地面站台的两座车站之一。高架站台由往返于伯明翰和德比之间的 CrossCountry 列车使用。

source: Opened in 1847, Lichfield Trent Valley is one of two stations that serve the city of Lichfield (the other being Lichfield City). The high-level platforms are served by Birmingham Cross City services to Bromsgrove and the low-level platforms are served by Avanti West Coast services to/from London and LNwR services between London and Crewe.
target: 利奇菲尔德特伦特谷站于1847年开通，是服务于利奇菲尔德市的两座车站之一（另一座为利奇菲尔德市站）。高架站台由开往布罗姆斯格罗夫的伯明翰跨城线列车使用，地面站台由往返于伦敦的 Avanti West Coast 列车以及往返于伦敦和克鲁之间的 LNwR 列车使用。

source: Opened in 1847, Nuneaton station serves the market town of Nuneaton. Until 1968, Nuneaton had a second station (Nuneaton Abbey Street) on the Birmingham - Nuneaton - Leicester line, which is now served by the current Nuneaton station on platforms six and seven. The station is also served by local trains to Leamington Spa on the Coventry to Nuneaton line.
target: 纽尼顿站于1847年开通，服务于集镇纽尼顿。在1968年之前，纽尼顿在伯明翰 - 纽尼顿 - 莱斯特线上拥有第二座车站（纽尼顿阿比街站），该线的列车现在在现纽尼顿站的六号和七号站台停靠。该站还服务于考文垂至纽尼顿线开往皇家利明顿温泉的普速列车。

source: Planned engineering work has closed the Trent Valley line north of Tamworth. In order to keep passengers moving, a special timetable is in operation with services terminating here at Tamworth.

source: Planned improvement works are underway near Lichfield. As a result, services are running as far as Tamworth. Start a southbound express to Rugby, then form a stopping service to Milton Keynes.
target: 利奇菲尔德附近正在进行计划内的改建工程。因此，列车服务最远只能运行到塔姆沃思。开启一班前往拉格比的南行快速列车，然后运行一班前往米尔顿凯恩斯中央站的各站停车列车。

source: Signaller: “Hello driver of 1U41 standing at the Polesworth station platform. I understand you have visually inspected your train and it is fit to move.”

source: Signaller: “Hello driver of 1U41 standing on the Trent Valley Down Slow.”
target: 信号员：“你好，停在特伦特谷下行慢车线上的 1U41 次列车司机。”

source: Signaller: “Hello driver of 1Z97 standing at NL9450 on the Down Fast Trent Valley.”

source: Signaller: “Hello driver of 1Z99 at Polesworth station. You have coupled to the failed train at the station and are waiting for further instructions.”
target: 信号员：“你好，停在波尔斯沃思车站的 1Z99 次列车司机。你已经与车站内发生故障的列车连挂，正在等待进一步指示。”

source: Signaller: “Hello driver of 1Z99 standing at signal NL5473 on the Down Trent Valley Slow. I give you permission to pass NL5473 at danger. Then proceed at caution to couple to the failed train in Polesworth station.”
target: 信号员：“你好，停在下行特伦特谷慢车线信号机 NL5473 处的 1Z99 次列车司机。我特许你越过显示险阻信号的 NL5473。然后以谨慎速度前进，与波尔斯沃思车站内发生故障的列车连挂。”

source: Signaller: “I understand you have a wheelflat on your train and wish to stop at Polesworth station for a visual inspection.”
target: 信号员：“我知道你的列车车轮有擦伤，并希望在波尔斯沃思车站停车进行外观检查。”

source: Signaller: “Ok driver, I understand that debris is blocking the Down Slow and Down Fast lines and you are unable to progress.”
target: 信号员：“好的，司机。我明白瓦砾阻断了下行慢车线和下行快车线，你无法继续前进。”

source: Signaller: “Ok, driver. Please detach the damaged unit at Tamworth and another driver will return it to the depot.”
target: 信号员：“好的，司机。请在塔姆沃思解编受损的动车组，另一位司机将把它送回车段。”
信号员：“好的，司机。信号员通话完毕。”

source: Signaller: “Ok. Depart when ready with service 5Z35 to Northampton Depot, reversing at Tamworth station.”
target: 信号员：“好的。准备好后，驾驶 5Z35 班次列车出发前往北安普顿车段，在塔姆沃思车站折返。”

source: Signaller: “Thank you, driver. Shut down your train and remain at your current position.”
target: 信号员：“谢谢你，司机。关闭你的列车并保持在当前位置。”
信号员：“正确。信号员通话完毕。”
信号员：“正确。信号员通话完毕。”

source: The Class 350/4 EMUs consist of ten four-car units that were built between 2013 and 2014 in Krefeld, Germany for TransPennine Express. The first unit entered service on 30 December 2013 operating between Manchester and Scotland.
target: 350/4 型电力动车组由十组四节编组的动车组组成，于 2013 年至 2014 年期间在德国克雷费尔德为 TransPennine Express 制造。第一组于 2013 年 12 月 30 日投入运营，在曼彻斯特和苏格兰之间运行。

source: The Class 350/4 EMUs consist of ten four-car units that were built between 2013 and 2014 in Krefeld, Germany for TransPennine Express. The first unit entered service on 30 December 2013 operating between Manchester and Scotland.
target: 350/4 型电力动车组由十组四节编组的动车组组成，于 2013 年至 2014 年期间在德国克雷费尔德为 TransPennine Express 制造。第一组于 2013 年 12 月 30 日投入运营，在曼彻斯特和苏格兰之间运行。

source: The Class 350/4 features a combined Power / Brake Controller (PBC) that controls how much power or brake force is applied to the train. The further away the PBC is moved from Off, the more power or brake will be applied.
target: 350/4 型动车组配备组合式主手柄，用于控制向列车施加多少牵引力或制动力。手柄偏离“关闭”位置越远，施加的牵引力或制动力就越大。

source: The Class 350/4s began running on the line in 2020 to work commuter services between London and Crewe and are depicted in the current LNwR livery.
target: 350/4 型动车组于 2020 年开始在该线路上运行，执行伦敦和克鲁之间的通勤班次，并采用了当前的 LNwR 涂装。

source: The Class 350/4s began running on the line in 2020 to work commuter services between London and Crewe and are depicted in the current LNwR livery.
target: 350/4 型动车组于 2020 年开始在该线路上运行，执行伦敦和克鲁之间的通勤班次，并采用了当前的 LNwR 涂装。

source: The Class 350/4s have a power output of 2680 horsepower (2 MW) to give a maximum speed of 110 mph. On the West Coast Main Line, these units must adhere to the Permissible Speed (PS) and Multiple Unit (MU) speeds displayed on speed boards and not the Enhanced Permitted Speed (EPS) that are only for tilting trains.
target: 350/4 型动车组的功率输出为 2680 马力（2 MW），最大速度为 110 英里/小时。在西海岸干线上，这些动车组必须遵守限速牌上显示的允许速度（PS）和动车组速度（MU），而不是仅供摆式列车使用的提高的允许速度（EPS）。

source: The Class 350/4s have a power output of 2680 horsepower (2 MW) to give a maximum speed of 110 mph. source: The Class 807 Electric Multiple Units consist of ten seven-car units built by Hitachi Rail in Kasado, Japan with final assembly taking place in Newton Aycliffe, Country Durham.
target: 807 型电力动车组由十组七节编组的动车组组成，由日立铁路在日本笠户制造，最终组装在达勒姆郡的纽顿艾克利夫进行。

source: The Class 807 Electric Multiple Units consist of ten seven-car units built by Hitachi Rail in Kasado, Japan with final assembly taking place in Newton Aycliffe, Country Durham.
target: 807 型电力动车组由十组七节编组的动车组组成，由日立铁路在日本笠户制造，最终组装在达勒姆郡的纽顿艾克利夫进行。

source: The Class 807 features a combined Power and Brake Controller (PBC). This controls how much power or brake force is being applied to the train. The further away from Off the PBC is, the greater amount of power or brake force will be applied.
target: 807 型动车组配备组合式动力和制动控制手柄。这控制了施加到列车上的牵引力或制动力的大小。主手柄偏离“关闭”位置越远，施加的牵引力或制动力就越大。

source: The Class 807 features a combined Power and Brake Controller (PBC). This controls how much power or brake force is being applied to the train. The further away from Off the PBC is, the greater amount of power or brake force will be applied.
target: 807 型动车组配备组合式动力和制动控制手柄。这控制了施加到列车上的牵引力或制动力的大小。主手柄偏离“关闭”位置越远，施加的牵引力或制动力就越大。

source: The Class 807 units have a maximum speed of 125 mph. However, you must adhere to the Permissible Speed (PS) and Multiple Unit (MU) speeds displayed on speed boards and not the Enhanced Permitted Speed (EPS) that are only for tilting trains.
target: 807 型动车组的最大速度为 125 英里/小时。然而，您必须遵守限速牌上显示的允许速度（PS）和动车组速度（MU），而不是仅供摆式列车使用的提高的允许速度（EPS）。

source: The Class 807 units have a maximum speed of 125 mph. However, you must adhere to the Permissible Speed (PS) and Multiple Unit (MU) speeds displayed on speed boards and not the Enhanced Permitted Speed (EPS) that are only for tilting trains.
target: 807 型动车组的最大速度为 125 英里/小时。然而，您必须遵守限速牌上显示的允许速度（PS）和动车组速度（MU），而不是仅供摆式列车使用的提高的允许速度（EPS）。

source: The Class 807s began running on the line in 2024 to work intercity services between London, Liverpool and Blackpool. It is depicted in Avanti West Coast livery.
target: 807 型动车组于 2024 年开始在该线路上运行，执掌伦敦、利物浦和布莱克浦之间的城际班次。它采用了 Avanti West Coast 涂装。

source: The Class 807s began running on the line in 2024 to work intercity services between London, Liverpool and Blackpool. It is depicted in Avanti West Coast livery.
target: 807 型动车组于 2024 年开始在该线路上运行，执掌伦敦、利物浦和布莱克浦之间的城际班次。它采用了 Avanti West Coast 涂装。

source: The Trent Valley section of the West Coast Main Line runs for 51 miles between Rugby in the south to Stafford in the north, following the River Trent. Opening in 1847 by the London & Northwestern Railway (LNwR), it provides a more direct link between London and North West England and Scotland avoiding the congested lines around Birmingham.
target: 西海岸干线的特伦特谷路段全长 51 英里，南起拉格比，北至斯塔福德，顺特伦特河而建。它于 1847 年由伦敦和西北铁路开通，提供了伦敦与英格兰西北部及苏格兰之间更直接的联系，避开了伯明翰周围繁忙的线路。

source: The Trent Valley section of the West Coast Main Line runs for 51 miles between Rugby in the south to Stafford in the north, following the River Trent. Opening in 1847 by the London & Northwestern Railway (LNwR), it provides a more direct link between London and North West England and Scotland avoiding the congested lines around Birmingham.
target: 西海岸干线的特伦特谷路段全长 51 英里，南起拉格比，北至斯塔福德，顺特伦特河而建。它于 1847 年由伦敦和西北铁路开通，提供了伦敦与英格兰西北部及苏格兰之间更直接的联系，避开了伯明翰周围繁忙的线路。

source: The Up Slow and Up Fast lines between Amington Junction and Nuneaton are also closed for engineering work. As a result, you’ll be travelling on the bi-directional Down Fast.
target: 阿明顿分歧点与纽尼顿之间的上行慢车线和上行快车线也因工程施工而关闭。因此，您将在双向的下行快车线上行驶。

source: The brake test is complete. Reset the emergency brake plunger and continue to the next station.
target: 制动测试已完成。复位紧急制动按钮并继续前往下一站。

source: The current speed limit is shown on the Heads Up Display (HUD). The white bar around the HUD displays your current speed. This increases as your speed increases. The red mark displays the current speed limit, which you should aim to not exceed.
target: 当前的限速显示在抬头显示上。抬头显示周围的白色光条显示您当前的速度。它随着您速度的增加而增长。红色标记显示当前的限速，您应注意不要超过它。

source: The current speed limit is shown on the Heads Up Display (HUD). The white bar around the HUD displays your current speed. This increases as your speed increases. The red mark displays the current speed limit, which you should aim to not exceed.
target: 当前的限速显示在抬头显示上。抬头显示周围的白色光条显示您当前的速度。它随着您速度的增加而增长。红色标记显示当前的限速，您应注意不要超过它。

source: The day begins on the West Coast Main Line. Step into the role of an Avanti West Coast driver and take charge of morning intercity services between Crewe and Milton Keynes. With early departures, tight schedules, and a busy railway coming to life, precision and smooth driving are essential as you set the pace for the day ahead.
target: 这一天在西海岸干线上开始。扮演 Avanti West Coast 司机的角色，执掌克鲁和米尔顿凯恩斯中央站之间的早间城际班次。伴随着清晨的出发、紧凑的时间表和繁忙的铁路，在您为未来的一天奠定基调时，精准和顺畅的驾驶是至关重要的。

source: The evening peak takes hold as you return to the cab with London Northwestern Railway. Operate busy commuter and regional services on the West Coast Main Line between Crewe and Milton Keynes, dealing with packed platforms, frequent stops, and heavy traffic as the network works at full capacity.
target: 随着您回到 London Northwestern Railway 的司机室，晚高峰开始了。在克鲁和米尔顿凯恩斯中央站之间的西海岸干线上运营繁忙的通勤和区域班次，在铁路网全力运转时应对拥挤的站台、频繁的停车和繁忙的交通。

source: The issue has now been repaired and trains are cleared to run again. You’ve joined your train here at Milton Keynes Central to drive northbound. However, due to your delay, your train will be terminated at Stafford to try and mitigate delays on the train’s next southbound service.
target: 问题现已修复，列车已获准再次运行。您在米尔顿凯恩斯中央站登上了您的列车向北行驶。然而，由于您的延误，您的列车将在斯塔福德终止行程，以试图减轻该列车下一班南行服务时的延误。

source: The last of the lineside workers can alight here. Open the left passenger doors to let them alight.
target: 最后一名路旁工作人员可以在这里下车。打开左侧客车门让他们下车。

source: The line to Polesworth is clear.
target: 通往波尔斯沃思的线路已开通。

source: The line to Tamworth is clear.
target: 通往塔姆沃思的线路已开通。

source: The line to Tamworth is clear.
target: 通往塔姆沃思的线路已开通。

source: The lineside workers will get to work clearing the line. The next debris site is at Polesworth station. Depart when ready.
target: 路旁工作人员将开始清理线路。下一个瓦砾地点在波尔斯沃思车站。准备好后出发。

source: The low-level platforms followed in 1847 when the Trent Valley line opened. There was a chord linking the two levels together, but this was lifted in 1969. Most services on the low-level platforms are operated by LNwR with Avanti West Coast calling here almost hourly with intercity services to/from London.
target: 低层站台随后于 1847 年随着特伦特谷线的开通而启用。曾有一条联络线将这两个高度不同的站台连在一起，但它在 1969 年被拆除。低层站台的大部分班次由 LNwR 运营，Avanti West Coast 几乎每小时在这里停靠一次，提供往返伦敦的城际班次。

source: The morning rush is in full swing as you step into the role of a London Northwestern Railway driver. Operate stopping and regional services on the West Coast Main Line between Crewe and Milton Keynes, managing frequent station calls, busy platforms, and tight turnarounds as the commuter railway comes to life.
target: 当您扮演 London Northwestern Railway 司机的角色时，早高峰正处于最繁忙的阶段。在克鲁和米尔顿凯恩斯中央站之间的西海岸干线上运营普客和区域班次，在通勤铁路焕发活力时管理频繁的车站停靠、繁忙的站台和紧凑的折返时间。

source: The narrowboat in a bottle represents all the canals that the Trent Valley line was built adjacent to. These include the Trent & Mersey, Birmingham & Fazeley and The Grand Union Canal.
target: 瓶中窄船代表了特伦特谷线建造时相邻的所有运河。这些包括特伦特和默西运河、伯明翰和法兹利运河以及大联合运河。

source: The narrowboat in a bottle represents all the canals that the Trent Valley line was built adjacent to. These include the Trent & Mersey, Birmingham & Fazeley and The Grand Union Canal.
target: 瓶中窄船代表了特伦特谷线建造时相邻的所有运河。这些包括特伦特和默西运河、伯明翰和法兹利运河以及大联合运河。

source: The platform is on the left side, so please open the left passenger doors.
target: 站台在左侧，请打开左侧客车门。

source: The platform is on the left side, so please open the left passenger doors.
target: 站台在左侧，请打开左侧客车门。

source: The route comes with two electric multiple units: the Class 350/4 and Class 807 to perform a mixture of commuter and intercity services on the route.
target: 该路线带有两种电力动车组：350/4 型和 807 型，用以在该路线上执行通勤和城际班次的混合运营。

source: The route comes with two electric multiple units: the Class 350/4 and Class 807 to perform a mixture of commuter and intercity services on the route.
target: 该路线带有两种电力动车组：350/4 型和 807 型，用以在该路线上执行通勤和城际班次的混合运营。

source: The slow lines are closed between Hanslope Jn and Wolverton. As a result, you’ll be using the platforms on the fast lines at Wolverton.
target: 汉斯洛普分歧点与伍尔弗顿之间的慢车线已关闭。因此，您将使用伍尔弗顿快车线上的站台。

source: The station also receives regular intercity Avanti West Coast services to and from Manchester Piccadilly. CrossCountry provides services to Birmingham, Leicester and Stansted Airport. LNwR provides the rest of the services to London and Crewe.
target: 该车站还定期接收往返曼彻斯特皮卡迪利站的 Avanti West Coast 城际班次。CrossCountry 提供前往伯明翰、莱斯特和斯坦斯特德机场的班次。LNwR 提供前往伦敦和克鲁的其余班次。

source: The test run is a success! The train will start heading back southbound soon.
target: 测试运行成功！列车很快将开始向南返回。

source: The town where the sport was invented. Opened in 1885, Rugby station sits between two major junctions on the line, resulting in the station seeing plenty of traffic stopping and passing through! The current station layout is the result of a drastic rebuild that took place between 2006 and 2008 to increase track speeds and add more platforms.
target: 作为这项运动的诞生地，拉格比站启用干1885年，坐落在线路上的两个主要枢纽之间，这使得该站有大量的列车停靠和通过！目前的车站布局是2006年至2008年间进行的大规模重建的结果，目的是提高线路限速并增加更多站台。

source: The train is now ready for service. Depart when ready for Station One where we will learn how to change cab ends and operate the passenger doors. All manual junctions will be set for you.
target: 列车现在已准备好投入运营。准备好后便可出发前往一号站，在那里我们将学习如何更换驾驶端以及操作客车门。所有手动道岔都已为您设置妥当。

source: The train is now ready for service. Depart when ready for Station One where we will learn how to change cab ends and operate the passenger doors. All manual junctions will be set for you.
target: 列车现在已准备好投入运营。准备好后便可出发前往一号站，在那里我们将学习如何更换驾驶端以及操作客车门。所有手动道岔都已为您设置妥当。

source: The train is ready to depart. Make sure the platform is clear and the OFF Indicator is displaying ‘OFF’. This means the signal at the end of the platform isn’t displaying a danger (red) aspect. Then, blow your whistle to the guard to close the passenger doors.
target: 列车已准备好出发。确保站台安全且“离站”指示器显示“OFF”。这意味着站台末端的信号机未显示红灯。然后，向列车员吹哨以关闭车门。

source: The train will wait here until the line is cleared. Well done today.
target: 列车将在此等待，直到线路空闲。表现不错。

source: The two trains are now coupled. Return to the front of the train and board passengers.
target: 两列列车现已重联。返回列车前部并开始让旅客上车。

source: The two units are now coupled. Change cabs to the front unit and contact the signaller.
target: 两组动车组现已重联。换端到前部动车组并联系信号员。

source: The two units are now uncoupled. Shut down this cab to finish off with.
target: 两组动车组现已解编。关闭此驾驶室以完成操作。

source: The two units are now uncoupled. Shut down this cab to finish off with.
target: 两组动车组现已解编。关闭此驾驶室以完成操作。

source: The two units will now divide. Follow the instructions for uncoupling the two trains and closing the intermediate doors.
target: 两组动车组现在将进行解编。请按照解编两列列车和关闭中间通道门的说明进行操作。

source: The units have been uncoupled. Return to the front of the train to continue your journey.
target: 动车组已解编。返回列车前部以继续您的行程。

source: The world famous sport of Rugby originated in the town of the same name in the 19th century. Dotted around the route are rugby balls for you to collect!
target: 举世闻名的拉格比（橄榄球）运动于19世纪起源于同名城镇。路线周围散落着橄榄球供您收集！

source: The world famous sport of Rugby originated in the town of the same name in the 19th century. Dotted around the route are rugby balls for you to collect!
target: 举世闻名的拉格比（橄榄球）运动于19世纪起源于同名城镇。路线周围散落着橄榄球供您收集！

source: Their time with TransPennine Express came to an end in 2020 when they were replaced with newer Class 397 units, at which time they were transferred to London Northwestern Railway (LNwR) to work with the rest of the Class 350 fleet.
target: 它们在 TransPennine Express 服役的时间于2020年结束，当时它们被更新的397型动车组取代，并在此转入伦敦西北铁路（LNwR）以与350型动车组车队的其余部分共同运营。

source: Their time with TransPennine Express came to an end in 2020 when they were replaced with newer Class 397 units, at which time they were transferred to London Northwestern Railway (LNwR) to work with the rest of the Class 350 fleet.
target: 它们在 TransPennine Express 服役的时间于2020年结束，当时它们被更新的397型动车组取代，并在此转入伦敦西北铁路（LNwR）以与350型动车组车队的其余部分共同运营。

source: There used to be a station here, which opened in 1847. Services ran in both directions to Stafford and Stone. Services to Stone were withdrawn in 1947 and the rest in 1958. Only the station house remains, which is Grade II listed.
target: 这里曾经有一个车站，于1847年启用。列车双向开往斯塔福德和斯通。前往斯通的客运服务于1947年取消，其余服务于1958年取消。现在仅存车站大楼，该建筑被列为二级登录建筑。

source: These units are similar to the Class 805s in that they can both draw power from the 25 kV overhead wires, but are different in that only the Class 805s can utilise their on-board diesel engines to run on non-electrified lines, whereas the Class 807s are electric-only. The Class 805s are formed of five coaches and the Class 807s are formed of seven coaches.
target: 这些动车组与805型动车组类似，因为它们都可以从25千伏接触网获取动力，但不同之处在于只有805型动车组可以利用其车载柴油发动机在非电气化线路上运行，而807型动车组则仅限电力驱动。805型动车组由五节车厢组成，807型动车组由七节车厢组成。

source: These units are similar to the Class 805s in that they can both draw power from the 25 kV overhead wires, but are different in that only the Class 805s can utilise their on-board diesel engines to run on non-electrified lines, whereas the Class 807s are electric-only. The Class 805s are formed of five coaches and the Class 807s are formed of seven coaches.
target: 这些动车组与805型动车组类似，因为它们都可以从25千伏接触网获取动力，但不同之处在于只有805型动车组可以利用其车载柴油发动机在非电气化线路上运行，而807型动车组则仅限电力驱动。805型动车组由五节车厢组成，807型动车组由七节车厢组成。

source: This afternoon, you’ll be driving the 13:50 departure to London Euston as far as Rugby, before forming a commuter train together and taking it as far as Milton Keynes Central.
target: 今天下午，您将驾驶13:50出发前往伦敦尤斯顿的列车至拉格比，然后共同组成一列通勤列车并将其驾驶至米尔顿凯恩斯中央站。

source: This concludes the introduction tutorial for the Class 350/4.
target: 350/4型动车组的介绍教程到此结束。

source: This concludes the introduction tutorial for the Class 350/4.
target: 350/4型动车组的介绍教程到此结束。

source: This concludes the passenger door operations of the training. Depart when ready for the Switch Lines and stop in front of another Class 350/4 unit.
target: 培训的旅客列车车门操作部分到此结束。准备好后便可出发前往转换线，并停在另一组350/4型动车组前。

source: This concludes the passenger door operations of the training. Depart when ready for the Switch Lines and stop in front of another Class 350/4 unit.
target: 培训的旅客列车车门操作部分到此结束。准备好后便可出发前往转换线，并停在另一组350/4型动车组前。

source: This concludes this introduction. Have fun driving the Class 807!
target: 本介绍到此结束。祝您驾驶807型动车组愉快！

source: This concludes this introduction. Have fun driving the Class 807!
target: 本介绍到此结束。祝您驾驶807型动车组愉快！

source: This is Brinklow, where the four tracks decrease to three due to infrastructure restrictions as we run along the Oxford Canal. The line increases back to four tracks at Attleborough Junction near Nuneaton seven miles from here. This means there are two tracks in the Up direction and one track in the Down direction.
target: 这里是布林克洛，由于我们在牛津运河旁运行时的基础设施限制，四线轨道在此减少为三线。线路在距离此处7英里的纽尼顿附近的阿特尔伯勒枢纽重新增加到四线轨道。这意味着上行方向有两条轨道，下行方向有一条轨道。

source: This is the end of the line for the test run. Shut down the cab to finish off with.
target: 测试运行到此结束。关闭驾驶室以完成操作。

source: This is where another driver will take over the train to London Euston. Please make your way over towards platform 3 and set up the train currently in the siding.
target: 另一位司机将在此接管前往伦敦尤斯顿的列车。请前往3站台并整备目前停在侧线上的列车。

source: This is where everything comes together. Take on a demanding mix of services for Avanti West Coast and London Northwestern Railway, operating across the West Coast Main Line between Crewe and Milton Keynes in challenging conditions. With severe weather, reduced visibility, and increased pressure, adaptability and precision are essential as you put your full range of driving skills to the test.
target: 这是所有元素汇聚的地方。在具有挑战性的条件下，为Avanti West Coast和伦敦西北铁路承担充满挑战的各种客运服务，在克鲁和米尔顿凯恩斯之间的西海岸干线上运行。面对恶劣的天气、能见度降低和压力增加，当您对驾驶技能进行全面测试时，适应能力和精准度至关重要。

source: This morning, you’ll be learning the basics about the Class 350/4 EMU. You’ll learn about the basic driving controls, passenger operations, changing cab ends and coupling/uncoupling two units.
target: 今天早上，您将学习350/4型电力动车组的基础知识。您将学习基础驾驶控制、客运操作、更换驾驶端以及两组动车组的重联与解编。

source: This morning, you’ll be learning the basics about the Class 350/4 EMU. You’ll learn about the basic driving controls, passenger operations, changing cab ends and coupling/uncoupling two units.
target: 今天早上，您将学习350/4型电力动车组的基础知识。您将学习基础驾驶控制、客运操作、更换驾驶端以及两组动车组的重联与解编。

source: This station opened in 1847 with the Trent Valley line itself and was joined by the Chase Line in 1870, acting as an interchange for passengers from London and Walsall. The Chase Line from Walsall was electrified in 2019 so electric trains could operate from Birmingham.
target: 该站于1847年与特伦特谷线一同启用，并于1870年与蔡斯线交汇，作为来自伦敦和沃尔索尔旅客的换乘站。来自沃尔索尔的蔡斯线于2019年完成电气化，以便电力动车组能从伯明翰运行。

source: This train has four notches of power. P1 is Power Notch 1. P4 is Power Notch 4. The more power you give the train, the faster it will accelerate.
target: 该列车有四个动力级位。P1是动力1级。P4是动力4级。您给列车的动力越多，它的加速就越快。

source: This train has four notches of power. P1 is Power Notch 1. P4 is Power Notch 4. The more power you give the train, the faster it will accelerate.
target: 该列车有四个动力级位。P1是动力1级。P4是动力4级。您给列车的动力越多，它的加速就越快。

source: This train has four notches of power. P1 is Power Notch 1. P4 is Power Notch 4. The more power you give the train, the faster it will accelerate.
target: 该列车有四个动力级位。P1是动力1级。P4是动力4级。您给列车的动力越多，它的加速就越快。

source: This train has four notches of power. P1 is Power Notch 1. P4 is Power Notch 4. The more power you give the train, the faster it will accelerate.
target: 该列车有四个动力级位。P1是动力1级。P4是动力4级。您给列车的动力越多，它的加速就越快。

source: This train will form the 14:30 to London. Stop just beyond the junction, change ends and couple to the train in platform 2.
target: 这趟列车将作为14:30开往伦敦的列车。在枢纽外停下，换端并与2站台的列车重联。

source: We are about to pass a worksite for High Speed 2 (HS2). HS2 will be a new high speed railway line to connect London and Birmingham with trains running at a planned speed of 205 mph (330 km/h). This will cut down on journey times between the two cities and create more capacity on the busy WCML out of London Euston.
target: 我们即将经过2号高速铁路（HS2）的建设工地。HS2将是一条连接伦敦和伯明翰的新高速铁路，列车的设计运行速度为205英里/小时（330公里/小时）。这将缩短两座城市之间的旅行时间，并为繁忙的西海岸干线伦敦尤斯顿段腾出更多容量。

source: We can now depart for Polesworth. Please stop at signal NL5473 to contact the signaller so they can let you enter the occupied signal block.
target: 我们现在可以出发前往波尔斯沃思了。请停在信号机NL5473前联系信号员，以便他们让您进入已被占用的信号分区。

source: We will now begin the procedure to couple these two units together. Pull forward and gently couple to the other unit in front of you and follow the instructions to open the intermediate cab doors so that passengers will be able to walk through the whole train.
target: 我们现在将开始重联这两组动车组的程序。向前推进并与您前方的另一组动车组轻轻重联，并按照说明打开中间的驾驶室通道门，以便旅客能够在整列列车中通行。

source: We will now begin the procedure to couple these two units together. Pull forward and gently couple to the other unit in front of you and follow the instructions to open the intermediate cab doors so that passengers will be able to walk through the whole train.
target: 我们现在将开始重联这两组动车组的程序。向前推进并与您前方的另一组动车组轻轻重联，并按照说明打开中间的驾驶室通道门，以便旅客能够在整列列车中通行。

source: We're approaching Station One. Begin applying a small amount of braking force on the PBC.
target: 我们正在接近一号站。开始在主控手柄上施加少量的制动力。

source: We're approaching Station One. Begin applying a small amount of braking force on the PBC.

source: We're approaching the next station. Begin applying braking force on the PBC by moving it to the braking range to ensure you stop at the location indicated.
target: 我们正在接近下一站。通过将主控手柄移动到制动区域开始施加制动力，以确保您在指示的位置停下。

source: We're approaching the next station. Begin applying braking force on the PBC by moving it to the braking range to ensure you stop at the location indicated.
target: 我们正在接近下一站。通过将主控手柄移动到制动区域开始施加制动力，以确保您在指示的位置停下。

source: Welcome to this introduction for the West Coast Main Line: Trent Valley route! This afternoon, you’ll be given a brief history of the route, the stock included and what you can collect.
target: 欢迎来到西海岸干线：特伦特谷路线简介！今天下午，我们将向您简要介绍该路线的历史、包含的车辆以及您可以收集的物品。

source: Welcome to this introduction for the West Coast Main Line: Trent Valley route! This afternoon, you’ll be given a brief history of the route, the stock included and what you can collect.
target: 欢迎来到西海岸干线：特伦特谷路线简介！今天下午，我们将向您简要介绍该路线的历史、包含的车辆以及您可以收集的物品。

source: Welcome to this introduction to the Class 807. In this tutorial, we’ll cover how to set up the cab, drive the train, change cab ends and passenger door operations.
target: 欢迎来到 807 型动车组教程。在本教程中，我们将介绍如何整备驾驶室、驾驶列车、更换驾驶端以及客车门操作。

source: Welcome to this introduction to the Class 807. In this tutorial, we’ll cover how to set up the cab, drive the train, change cab ends and passenger door operations.
target: 欢迎来到 807 型动车组教程。在本教程中，我们将介绍如何整备驾驶室、驾驶列车、更换驾驶端以及客车门操作。

source: Well done! The failed train has been rescued and will wait for a path southbound to Northampton Depot.
target: 做得好！故障列车已被救援，并将等待向南前往北安普敦车辆段的线路排路。

source: Well done! The next driver will take the train into London. For you, time for a coffee!
target: 做得好！下一位司机将驾驶列车进入伦敦。对您来说，是时候喝杯咖啡了！

source: Well done! The speed test is complete. Continue as normal to the next station.
target: 做得好！速度测试已完成。继续正常运行至下一站。

source: Well done! The two units are now coupled together! Next, sit in the driver’s seat in the leading cab so you’re facing away from the buffers. You will then drive over to Station One where we will learn how to uncouple two units.
target: 做得好！两组动车组现已重联！接下来，坐在前部驾驶室的司机椅上，背对挡车器。然后您将驾驶列车前往一号站，在那里我们将学习如何解编两组动车组。

source: Well done! The two units are now coupled together! Next, sit in the driver’s seat in the leading cab so you’re facing away from the buffers. You will then drive over to Station One where we will learn how to uncouple two units.
target: 做得好！两组动车组现已重联！接下来，坐在前部驾驶室的司机椅上，背对挡车器。然后您将驾驶列车前往一号站，在那里我们将学习如何解编两组动车组。

source: Well done! You’ve beaten the harsh weather to arrive at Milton Keynes Central. Another driver is here to take over to London.
target: 做得好！您战胜了恶劣的天气，抵达了米尔顿凯恩斯中央站。另一位司机已在此准备接替您前往伦敦。

source: Well done! You’ve dispatched your first train! Your next train is scheduled to depart from platform four. Make your way over to the dispatch point.
target: 做得好！您已经发出了您的第一趟列车！您的下一趟列车计划从四站台出发。请前往发车点。
西海岸唤醒

source: We’ll be starting a speed test from here to measure the train’s performance. Follow the instructions to undertake the speed test.
target: 我们将从这里开始进行速度测试，以测量列车的性能。请按照说明进行速度测试。

source: We’re now going to perform an emergency brake test. Press the emergency brake plunger and wait for the train to stop.
target: 我们现在要进行紧急制动测试。按下紧急制动按钮并等待列车停稳。

source: Whilst exploring the route, be sure to look out for plenty of collectibles!
target: 在探索路线时，请务必留意丰富的收集品！

source: Whilst exploring the route, be sure to look out for plenty of collectibles!

target: 你的列车正接近 2 号站台。请前往该处并等待你的列车进站。

target: 你的列车正在进站。沿着标记穿过人行天桥前往 3 号站台，等待你的列车进站。

source: Your train is approaching the station. Follow the markers over the footbridge to platform 3 and wait for your train to arrive.
target: 你的列车正在进站。沿着标记穿过人行天桥前往 3 号站台，等待你的列车进站。

target: 你的列车现已准备好投入运营。我们现在将开始乘客车门操作流程。

source: Your train is waiting for you in the platform. Follow the markers to your train and sit in the driver’s seat.
target: 你的列车正在站台等待你。沿着标记前往你的列车，并在司机座就坐。

source: You’re currently at the Navigation Hub. Walk to the front of the train and sit in the driver’s seat.
target: 你目前位于导航中心。步行至列车前部，并在司机座就坐。

source: You’re currently at the Navigation Hub. Walk to the front of the train and sit in the driver’s seat.
target: 你目前位于导航中心。步行至列车前部，并在司机座就坐。

source: You’re here at Nuneaton, a busy station between Rugby and Tamworth with connections to Birmingham, Crewe, Leamington Spa, London, Manchester and Stansted Airport with services being operated by a variety of train companies like Avanti West Coast and London Northwestern Railway.
target: 你现在来到了纽尼顿，这是一座位于拉格比和塔姆沃思之间繁忙的车站，可通往伯明翰、克鲁、皇家利明顿温泉、伦敦、曼彻斯特和斯坦斯特德机场，列车由 Avanti West Coast 和 London Northwestern Railway 等多家铁路公司运营。

source: You’re here at Nuneaton, a busy station between Rugby and Tamworth with connections to Birmingham, Crewe, Leamington Spa, London, Manchester and Stansted Airport with services being operated by a variety of train companies like Avanti West Coast and London Northwestern Railway.
target: 你现在来到了纽尼顿，这是一座位于拉格比和塔姆沃思之间繁忙的车站，可通往伯明翰、克鲁、皇家利明顿温泉、伦敦、曼彻斯特和斯坦斯特德机场，列车由 Avanti West Coast 和 London Northwestern Railway 等多家铁路公司运营。

source: You’re here at Rugby station to undertake station dispatcher duties around the station.
target: 你现在来到了拉格比站，准备在车站周围执行站台调度的职责。

source: You’ve conquered the WCML in all conditions, mastering both intercity and commuter services under pressure. A true test of skill — and a fitting end to the Journey.
target: 你已在各种天气条件下征服了西海岸干线，在压力下熟练地掌控了城际和通勤列车。这是对技能的真正考验，也是本次旅程的圆满终点。

source: You’ve guided evening intercity services safely through one of the busiest periods on the WCML, bringing the day’s Avanti operations to a successful close.
target: 你已安全地引导晚间城际列车度过了西海岸干线上最繁忙的时段之一，为一天的 Avanti 运营画上了圆满的句号。

source: You’ve kept services moving through the evening peak, managing intense commuter operations and maintaining order on a fully loaded WCML.
target: 你在晚高峰期间保持了列车持续运行，成功管理了密集的通勤运营，并在满载的西海岸干线上维持了秩序。

source: You’ve successfully delivered the morning’s intercity services and kept the WCML moving at the start of the day. A solid beginning to your Journey as an Avanti West Coast driver.
target: 你已成功交付了早间的城际列车服务，并在一天开始之际保持了西海岸干线的畅通。作为一名 Avanti West Coast 司机，你的旅程有了一个扎实的起点。

source: You’ve successfully worked through the morning commuter rush, keeping services moving and passengers on time during one of the busiest parts of the day.
target: 你已成功度过了早高峰通勤时段，在一天中最繁忙的时段之一保持了列车运行并让乘客准时出行。
